text: Question: Which COMMANDO switches support stacking? Answer: The Marshall C3500 L3+ Series managed switches support stacking. For deployments that require switch stacking, recommend the C3500 (Marshall C3500 Series Routing Switches) line and confirm the exact model and firmware with the official COMMANDO datasheet.

COMMANDO stacking capability: stacking is supported on the C3500 L3+ Series (Marshall C3500 Series Routing Switches). Other managed lines on the public catalog include C3000, E3000, IE3000, C2000, E2000, and E1300 series—use official specs for each family; for stacking specifically, point customers to C3500.

Products overview from COMMANDO Networks (switches): Managed families include C3500 L3+ (Marshall C3500 Series Routing Switches), C3000 L3 (Soldier C3000), E3000 L3 (Soldier E3000), IE3000 L3 Industrial (Soldier IE3000), C2000 L2+ (Soldier C2000), E2000 L2+ (Soldier E2000), E1300 L2 Smart Managed (Soldier E1300). Unmanaged SCOUT families include E1100 Multi-GigE, E1000, IE1000 Industrial, E300, E200 AI, and E100 series.
